name: mm_dsa_prefill_topk_L2048
goal: Optimize solution.py against SGLang's flash_prefill_with_topk_index baseline for DSA prefill Indexer score + top-k at L=2048; beat every batch workload and match block indices exactly (atol=0).

baseline.measure: reference.py timed by the harness CUPTI runtime (median device-kernel us)
